title: Warehouse Associate
description:
Summary/Objective

Perform Inventory Clerk/Traffic Clerk functions for Samtec in order to maintain service, productivity, and profitability of the organization. Receive, pack, and process production orders properly and prepare them for shipping/export.


Essential Functions/ Responsibilities.

1. Ability to become Forklift certified

2. Facilitate/perform accurate shipping, receiving, and stocking operations

3. Rotation of following positions: D-Container, Stock, Receiving and Issuance

4. Facilitate accurate stocking operations

5. Supply boxes to support areas

6. Data entry

7. Provide outstanding customer service to our customers.

8. Required to perform all other functions in Inventory & Traffic as directed.

9. Ability to work independently and as part of the team.

“The responsibilities as defined are intended to serve as a general guideline for this position. Associates may be asked to perform additional tasks depending on strengths and capabilities.”


Required Experience

1. Sense of urgency.

2. Good written communication skills.

3. Ability to pay close attention to detail.

postedCompany.description:
Samtec is a global leader in high-performance interconnect solutions, driven by innovation, precision, and people. Founded in 1976 and headquartered in the United States, Samtec designs and manufactures a broad range of electronic interconnect products that power today’s most advanced technologies — from data centers and medical devices to industrial automation, aerospace, and next-generation electronics.

What truly sets Samtec apart is our people-first culture. We believe that long-term success comes from investing in our employees, fostering collaboration, and creating an environment where ideas are encouraged and careers can grow. At Samtec, you’ll work alongside passionate, talented professionals in a culture that values integrity, respect, continuous learning, and excellence.

With a strong global footprint and a commitment to engineering excellence, Samtec offers employees exposure to cutting-edge technology, cross-border collaboration, and meaningful work that makes a real impact. Whether you are an experienced professional or early in your career, Samtec provides opportunities to develop skills, take ownership, and grow together with the company.

Join Samtec — where innovation connects, and people matter.
postedCompany.name: SAMTEC ASIA PACIFIC PTE LTD

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
